title: nie-bot: async stdin reader task
description:
What: Async task that reads BotCommands from stdin line-by-line and sends to main loop.

Algorithm:
1. Create bot/src/stdin_reader.rs with pub async fn run(tx: mpsc::Sender<BotCommand>):
   - use tokio::io::{AsyncBufReadExt, BufReader}
   - loop: lines.next_line().await:
     - Ok(None) → EOF → return (clean exit, do not send error)
     - Ok(Some(line)) if line.trim().is_empty() → continue
     - Ok(Some(line)) → serde_json::from_str::<BotCommand>(&line) → Ok(cmd) → tx.send(cmd).await (if Err, receiver dropped, return)
     - parse Err → tx.send(BotCommand::Error equivalent is not a command... emit error somehow)
   - Actually: on parse error, emit BotEvent::Error to a separate events tx, not the command tx
2. Signature: pub async fn run(cmd_tx: mpsc::Sender<BotCommand>, event_tx: mpsc::Sender<BotEvent>)
   - parse error → event_tx.send(BotEvent::Error{reason: ..})

Defensive:
- EOF is clean exit, not error
- Malformed JSON: emit BotEvent::Error, continue reading (do not crash)
- tx.send failure (receiver dropped): return silently

Agent team: I (implementer). V (validator).
Tests: unit test with fake stdin channel in W2B scope or separate test file
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-bot clean; EOF returns cleanly; malformed JSON emits BotEvent::Error and continues
